subcodes.first_line: There hath appeared before Our presence that from which We perceived thy turning unto God, the Most Exalted, the Most Great, and thy recognition [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: قد حضر بین یدینا ما وجدنا منه اقبالک الی الله العلی العظیم و عرفانک مظهر
subcodes.subjects: @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @suffering and imprisonment, @Covenant-breaking and Covenant-breakers, @station of the Manifestation of God, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience
